name: io.github.Trust-Code-System/corenexia
description: Infinite Dynamic Orchestrator: an AI agent that writes Python and runs it in a hardened sandbox, exposed as the `orchestrate` MCP tool. Legal & general-finance flagship.

environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Anthropic API key for the orchestrator's LLM provider.

environmentVariables.name: AUTH_ENABLED
environmentVariables.description: When true, /mcp requires a Bearer API key or scoped OAuth token.
